name: vibe-editing
description: Raw footage in, finished captioned vertical clips out — with one command. Ingests a local file, a URL, or a cloud-drive link; transcribes; mines the best moments with a real editorial rubric; hand-cuts; face-tracks to 9:16; burns word-level captions; mixes music; renders (manifest-driven + stage-cached); and runs a 6-gate self-audit. 17 bundled skills + the full editorial method. Bring your own API keys, footage, music, and brand.
